_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Isometric Wave Grid Background
_meta.description: "Retro-futuristic isometric wave grid with real-time mouse distortion physics and ambient breathing animation. Features canvas-based rendering with gradient fade effects, smooth bezier interpolation, and vignette depth overlay. Mouse-reactive repulsion field creates dynamic 3D-depth illusion with non-linear force falloff. Customizable color (RGB), speed multiplier, and grid density. Zero-dependency, single-file portable. Built for shadcn/ui with TypeScript type safety. Ideal for hero sections, sci-fi dashboards, and cyberpunk interfaces."
